title: rubus scaberrimus var. sentellus
intro: Rubus scaberrimus var. sentellus, also known as the thimbleberry, is a type of bramble with edible fruits that are native to North America. The medicinal properties of thimbleberry include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which may help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of thimbleberry include supporting immune function, promoting cardiovascular health, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Thimbleberry can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile plant for various health applications.
